svg.title: Circuit Cart API Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing clients, API gateway, microservices, data stores, and external integrations for the Circuit Cart IoT e-commerce platform.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Circuit Cart web client and how it calls the API')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Circuit Cart mobile app and API integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about IoT device integration with Circuit Cart')
sendPrompt('Tell me about third-party integrations with Circuit Cart')
sendPrompt('Explain the API Gateway responsibilities in Circuit Cart: auth, rate limiting, routing, aggregation')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the User Service: registration, auth, profiles, addresses, sessions')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Order Service: cart, orders, checkout, returns')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Product Service: catalog, inventory, categories, reviews')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Payment Service: initiation, verification, refunds, webhooks')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Notification Service: in-app, push, email, SMS, templates')
sendPrompt('What database does the User Service use in Circuit Cart?')
sendPrompt('What database does the Order Service use in Circuit Cart?')
sendPrompt('What database and search engine does the Product Service use?')
sendPrompt('What database does the Payment Service use?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart use Redis for caching and sessions?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart use a message queue for async events?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart use object storage for images and files?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart integrate with Razorpay and Stripe for payments?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart send emails and SMS notifications?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart handle push notifications?')
sendPrompt('How does Circuit Cart use shipping and logistics APIs?')
